markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Tunnel / Bridge
markets.rules_primary: If Zohran Mamdani says Tunnel / Bridge as part of next NYC Mayor's Office announcement, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the next NYC Mayor's Office announcement will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the next NYC Mayor's Office announcement will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purposes of this market, “next NYC Mayor's Office announcement” refers to the first livestream on the NYC Mayor's Office main YouTube channel (@NYCMayorsOffice) after March 16th, 2026 at 12:10 PM ET. The livestream will resolve based on Zohran Mamdani speaking in an official capacity. If Zohran Mamdani is present during a livestream, but does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic).
Additional source agency streams can be used in the event of technical outages or if the NYC Mayor's Office ends the stream prior to the conclusion of the event.- The event must be opened to the press for a live televised or streamed event to qualify.
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.
markets.title: What will Zohran Mamdani say during next NYC Mayor's Office announcement?
markets.yes_sub_title: Tunnel / Bridge

markets.rules_primary: If Zohran Mamdani says Governor / Hochul as part of next NYC Mayor's Office announcement, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the next NYC Mayor's Office announcement will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the next NYC Mayor's Office announcement will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purposes of this market, “next NYC Mayor's Office announcement” refers to the first livestream on the NYC Mayor's Office main YouTube channel (@NYCMayorsOffice) after March 16th, 2026 at 12:10 PM ET. The livestream will resolve based on Zohran Mamdani speaking in an official capacity. If Zohran Mamdani is present during a livestream, but does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic).
Additional source agency streams can be used in the event of technical outages or if the NYC Mayor's Office ends the stream prior to the conclusion of the event.- The event must be opened to the press for a live televised or streamed event to qualify.
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Triple Double
markets.rules_primary: If the play by play or color commentator(s) says Triple Double as part of Golden State vs Boston Professional Basketball Game, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Golden State vs Boston Professional Basketball Game will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Golden State vs Boston Professional Basketball Game will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Commentary will count once tip off has occurred and end once the game has concluded. Should the game go into overtime, the commentary will continue to count until the game has ended. If the final play is in review, commentary will end following the referee decision. For the purpose of this market, this market will resolve based on the national broadcast. If it is not nationally televised the home team local broadcast will be used.
Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.
markets.title: What will the announcers say during Golden State vs Boston Professional Basketball Game?
markets.yes_sub_title: Triple Double

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Commentary will count once tip off has occurred and end once the game has concluded. Should the game go into overtime, the commentary will continue to count until the game has ended. If the final play is in review, commentary will end following the referee decision. For the purpose of this market, this market will resolve based on the national broadcast. If it is not nationally televised the home team local broadcast will be used.
Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Airball / Airballs / Airballed
markets.rules_primary: If the play by play or color commentator(s) says Airball / Airballs / Airballed as part of Golden State vs Boston Professional Basketball Game, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Golden State vs Boston Professional Basketball Game will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Golden State vs Boston Professional Basketball Game will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Commentary will count once tip off has occurred and end once the game has concluded. Should the game go into overtime, the commentary will continue to count until the game has ended. If the final play is in review, commentary will end following the referee decision. For the purpose of this market, this market will resolve based on the national broadcast. If it is not nationally televised the home team local broadcast will be used.
Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.

markets.no_sub_title: Wild Pitch
markets.rules_primary: If the play by play or color commentator(s) says Wild Pitch as part of Venezuela vs Italy professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 16, 2026 at 8:00 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Venezuela vs Italy professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 16, 2026 at 8:00 PM EDT will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Venezuela vs Italy professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 16, 2026 at 8:00 PM EDT will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Commentary will count following the first pitch and end once 9th inning has concluded or the mercy rule is enacted. The mercy rule will apply if a game ends from a team leading by at least 15 runs after the fifth inning or by at least 10 runs after the seventh inning. Should the game go into extra innings, the commentary will count. Commentary will no longer count following the conclusion of the final inning, if the final play is in review commentary will end following the umpire decision.
Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.
